title: Set up Jotai atomic state management in React / Next.js
summary: Install Jotai, define atoms, use derived and async atoms, persist state to localStorage, and integrate with Next.js App Router without hydration mismatches.
declaration: I will set up Jotai atomic state management. Jotai is a bottom-up, minimal alternative to Zustand/Redux. If you want Zustand (top-down store model) or Redux Toolkit instead, say so before I begin.
